text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has made dramatic<n>improvements
ever since summer<n>camp.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She has always been an imposing<n>figure to Narita
Taishin, ever since<n>they ran a race together as
children.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is still eager to win,<n>undaunted by
Biwa Hayahide, which<n>sends Narita Taishin into a
panic.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The fear of being left behind pushes<n>Narita Taishin
to act recklessly. In her<n>impatience, she ends up
damaging<n>her health.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin tearfully begs to run in<n>the Kikuka
Sho because racing and<n>winning are all that she
has.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm unable to deny her wish—not<n>when her pleas
are so heartrending.
